calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition To Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Benjamin J. Schnayerson, Esq. of Dillingham & Murphy LLP, Tel. 415.397.2700, for petitioner and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was uncontested. PETITIONER PATRICK HAGAN'S Petition To Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Richard A. Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Notice Of Petition To Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-17-2014 Continued To Mar-24-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: BENJAMIN SCHNAYERSON, ESQ., 415.397.2700, FOR PETITIONER PATRICK HAGAN; NO OTHER APPEARANCES.

RULING: Matter discussed. Counsel provides the Court with a copy of the proof of service. The tentative ruling is vacated and the hearing on PETITIONER PATRICK HAGAN's Petition To Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award is continued to March 24, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Counsel for petitioner to provide notice of new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
